title: armeniaca duracina
intro: Armeniaca duracina, also known as the apricot kernel tree, is a deciduous tree native to Central Asia, belonging to the Rosaceae family. The kernel of the apricot fruit has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation in the body. The kernel is rich in vitamin B17, a compound believed to have potential health benefits, including cancer prevention and treatment, although more research is needed to confirm this. Armeniaca duracina kernel can be prepared as an herbal supplement, often in the form of apricot kernel oil or powder, which can be added to food or taken as a dietary supplement.
